title: REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH - 211info
text: ONTARIO CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams. Sexually transmitted disease testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, testing for UTI infections and HPV immunizations services available. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks and surgical abortion up to 13 weeks and 6 days. 640 SW 4th Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thurday 9am-5pm, Wednesday 11am-7pm, Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 788-7273 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 788-7273 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for appointment FEES: OHP and most private insurance accepted, sliding scale fees available DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, insurance information, if applicable. Income information, if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Enter on 6th where our parking lot is located, patient entrance is on the parking lot side of the building. Services: Abortions Birth Control Counseling Colposcopy Emergency Contraception HIV Testing HPV Immunizations Pap Tests Pre-Abortion Counseling Pregnancy Testing Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization Women's Health Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - INFO FOR TEENS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ONTARIO CENTER
